data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] CI workflow sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var for Hook Tests job
  Verify: grep -q 'SUITE_TEST_INDEX' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- [ ] CI workflow sets SUITE_TEST_INDEX env var for Script Tests job
  Verify: grep -q 'SUITE_TEST_INDEX' .github/workflows/ci.yml
- [ ] SUITE_TEST_INDEX points to the repo .test-index path
- [ ] No runner script changes needed — env var only
- [ ] CI passes when only RED-zone failures exist (validated by existing tolerance tests)
